title: 秋華賞の後に・1歩、再び

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Dober wasn't able to win the
Triple Tiara, she feels a sense of accomplishment
after running with all her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the sake of her supporters, Mejiro Dober
vows not to cry and instead marches on straight
into her next challenge!
